PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(40\); $ok = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8123/api/health" -TimeoutSec 2; $ok = $true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($ok\) { $meta = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8123/api/meta" -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output \("categories: " + $meta.categories.Count + "  device: " + $meta.device + "  dataset: " + $meta.dataset_available\); $b = $meta.categories | Where-Object { $_.name -eq 'bottle' }; $b.variants | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \($_.id + " available=" + $_.available + " approximate=" + $_.approximate\) } } else { Write-Output "SERVER NOT UP" })

PowerShell($thumb = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "http://localhost:8123/api/dataset/thumb?cat=bottle&defect=good&filename=000.png&size=128" -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output \("thumb: " + $thumb.StatusCode + " " + $thumb.Headers['Content-Type'] + " " + $thumb.RawContentLength + " bytes"\); try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "http://localhost:8123/api/dataset/thumb?cat=..&defect=good&filename=000.png" -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { Write-Output \("traversal: " + $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) }; $mask = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "http://localhost:8123/api/dataset/mask?cat=bottle&defect=broken_large&filename=000.png" -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output \("mask: " + $mask.StatusCode + " " + $mask.Headers['Content-Type']\))
